title: Nerit
content:
{{Top|canon=Ossus's forest moon}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:OssusMoons.jpg]] |name=Nerit
{{C|Depicted on right}} |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=[[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]] |system=[[Adega system/Legends|Adega system]] |coordinates=R-6 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited=[[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate=Temperate |gravity=1.25 standard |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=[[Neti/Legends|Neti]] |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=A [[Unidentified Neti clan|Neti clan]] }} '''Nerit''' was one of the two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. It was temperate, with a varied ecosystem and gravity 125 percent of the standard. A [[Unidentified Neti clan|clan]] of expatriate [[Neti/Legends|Neti]] lived there. ==Appearances== *[[Knights of the Old Republic 30|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 30]] ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Nerit}} *''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' *''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] {{Po}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Nexus of Power]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Nerit |pl=Nerit }} [[Category:Adega system locations]] [[Category:Moons in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Moons in the Slice]]
